A-02.evidence:
API signatures match spec Section 3 exactly (READ verification):
- DataMap<TItem> interface: getDisplay(value: unknown): string|undefined, getItems(): TItem[], getValue(display: string): unknown (types.ts L11-18)
- PathOrAccessor<TItem, TReturn> = keyof TItem | ((item: TItem) => TReturn) (types.ts L21-23)
- CreateDataMapOptions<TItem> = { items: TItem[], valuePath: PathOrAccessor<TItem, unknown>, displayPath: PathOrAccessor<TItem, string> } (types.ts L25-29)
- TomisColumnDef<TData> = ColumnDef<TData, unknown> & { dataMap?: DataMap<unknown>|((row:TData)=>DataMap<unknown>), selectOptions?: string[] } (types.ts L43-56)
- createDataMap<TItem>(options: CreateDataMapOptions<TItem>): DataMap<TItem> (createDataMap.ts L20-22)

specCodeDefects.specLocation: G-001-spec.md D4 (Pre-decisions Table row 4, D4 prose column)
specCodeDefects.defect: D4 prose references 'Omit<ColumnDef<TData, unknown>, "meta"> & { meta?: TomisColumnMeta }' but TomisColumnMeta type is never defined anywhere in the spec. This is an internal spec inconsistency (undefined type reference).
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Used intersection pattern 'ColumnDef<TData, unknown> & { dataMap?; selectOptions? }' per spec Section 3.3 code template (executable template authoritative per C-30 truth table) + ADR-002 decision.

deviations.fromSpec: Spec D6: 'import * as gridLicense from @tomis/grid-license' + feature-detect pattern '(gridLicense as { verifyGridLicense?: () => void }).verifyGridLicense?.()'
deviations.toImpl: Inline stub function verifyOrWarn(_packageName: string) at index.ts L8-10, called at L11
deviations.reason: Environment constraint: @tomis/grid-license is not in package.json peerDependencies (D7 forbids G-001 package.json changes, delegates to G-004). pnpm workspace is not installed. Attempting D6 import pattern causes TypeScript TS2307: 'Cannot find module @tomis/grid-license' → violates C-12 (tsc 0 errors). Three constraints (D6 import, D7 no-modify, C-12 zero-errors) are mutually incompatible. C-12 is a rubric gate (F category) → takes precedence.
monorepoPrecedent: grid-pro-tracking/src/index.ts — uses identical verifyOrWarn stub pattern
deviations.resolution: G-004 (per spec Section 9) will add @tomis/grid-license to peerDependencies. After G-004 completion, index.ts can be updated to actual import per D6 pattern if desired. Current stub satisfies C-12 + C-24 (Pro licensing requirement).
